content.text:
Looking at the image, the track is a long straight ahead with the car perfectly centered on the dashed yellow line, fully on course.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 8, target index = (8+5) % 121 = 13
- Target WP13: x=5.0066, y=0.6840
- Car: x=4.1811, y=0.6883, heading=-0.142°
- dy = 0.6840 - 0.6883 = -0.0043, dx = 5.0066 - 4.1811 = 0.8255
- bearing = atan2(-0.0043, 0.8255) = -0.298°
- delta = -0.298 - (-0.142) = -0.156° → |delta| < 5°, go straight

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.381m, distance_from_center = 0.00463m
- edge_distance ≈ 0.376m → well clear on both sides

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Long straight ahead with car essentially centered and heading perfectly aligned with waypoints; delta is near zero so maintain full speed with no steering correction.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight along y≈0.683 before curving right around x=6.3.",
    "Big right curve begins around waypoint index 22-30 (x~6.3-7.2).",
    "After the right curve, track goes left and loops back.",
    "Track total length ~17.7m, 121 waypoints.",
    "Use steering_angle=0 on straights to avoid oscillation.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves.",
    "Car is nearly perfectly centered on the straight, heading ~0° (due east).",
    "Car making steady forward progress at 1.5 m/s on the straight.",
    "Waypoints 22-30 show significant right curve; prepare to steer right when approaching x~6.2.",
    "No objects on track detected."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [3.9583, 4.0730, 4.1811],
    "y": [0.6886, 0.6887, 0.6883],
    "heading": [0.042, -0.012, -0.142]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP13 at (5.007, 0.684): bearing=-0.30°, delta=-0.16° → essentially straight, no correction needed.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 0.0
}
```
